support.subtitle: Toolando.tech создаётся и предоставляется бесплатно. Если он экономит ваше время, подумайте о поддержке его развития.

openerPage.title: Универсальное открытие и конвертация файлов
openerPage.subtitle: Открывайте любой формат файлов — изображения, видео, аудио, PDF, документы, код и данные отображаются мгновенно. После открытия Toolando.tech сразу предлагает все подходящие форматы для конвертации в один клик.
openerPage.noConverter: Для этого формата у нас пока нет конвертера — но вы можете просмотреть и скачать файл ниже.

downloader.title: Multi-Platform → MP3 Downloader
downloader.subtitle: Paste a link from TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, Twitter/X, Vimeo or SoundCloud and grab the audio.
downloader.metaDescription: Multi-platform Video to MP3 Downloader — TikTok, Instagram, Facebook, Twitter, Vimeo, SoundCloud. Paste a link and download the audio.
downloader.invalidLink: Enter a valid link from a supported platform.
downloader.disclaimer: Toolando.tech does not host or download any media. It only detects the platform and the public video ID and hands off to an external service or your browser. Only download content you have the rights to.
downloader.externalNote: Download happens on an external service or in your browser. Toolando.tech only captured the public platform and video ID. Please respect copyright and each platform's terms of service.

faq.a: TikTok, Instagram Reels, Facebook, Twitter/X, Vimeo and SoundCloud — just paste a public link and the platform is detected automatically. YouTube is temporarily paused because YouTube actively blocks downloaders.

faq.q: Does Toolando.tech download the video on its servers?
faq.a: No. Toolando.tech never downloads or stores media. It only reads the public link to detect the platform and video ID, then hands off to an external service or your browser.
Yes, detecting the link and reading public metadata is completely free.

faq.q: Why do I only see a thumbnail for some links?
faq.a: We only show thumbnails that are publicly available without any login or API — for example YouTube's public image CDN. For other platforms the thumbnail may not be shown.

faq.q: Is it legal to download the audio?
faq.a: Only download content you own or have permission to use. Downloading copyrighted material without permission may violate the platform's terms of service and copyright law.

downloader.platformDisabled: Downloading from {platform} is temporarily unavailable — {platform} actively blocks downloaders, so we've paused it until our own converter is ready. All other platforms still work.
